remainingWork: Complete the executable WorkerSpec so all SDK construction inputs and diagnostics derive from one composition.
Implement trusted resolved-skill native binding independent of publish authority.
Extract and adopt one provider-neutral resolver core with cross-host parity fixtures.
Implement immutable/versioned rollout, stale-worker exclusion, and readiness-gating parent-child canary.
Add operator capability-failure classification, budget protection, diagnostics, metrics, and alerts.
Add required Temporal/Compose/replay/restart regression coverage and architecture/runbook documentation.
summary: The verified remediation attempt improves registry composition, fingerprinting, and readiness evidence but does not complete the authoritative MM-1202 target state. The complete structured findings and bounded backlog are in artifacts/jira-implement-verify.json.
